title: Unsloth: Fine-Tune LLMs 2-5x Faster with 80% Less Memory
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: Unsloth accelerates LLM fine-tuning by 2-5x while reducing memory usage by up to 80%, enabling efficient LoRA and QLoRA training of models like Llama, Mistral, and Gemma on consumer GPUs.

title: PyBullet: Physics Simulation for Robotics and Reinforcement Learning
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: PyBullet is a Python binding for the Bullet physics engine, providing real-time physics simulation for robotics, reinforcement learning, and VR applications.

title: TPOT: Automated Machine Learning with Genetic Programming
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: TPOT is a Python AutoML tool that uses genetic programming to automatically design and optimize scikit-learn machine learning pipelines.

title: LangChain: Build LLM-Powered Applications with Modern Composable Chains
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: A practical guide to LangChain, the framework for building LLM-powered applications using composable chains, prompt templates, and the LangChain Expression Language.

title: LangChain - A Framework for Building LLM-Powered Applications
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: A deep dive into the langchain-ai/langchain repository, exploring its modular architecture, LCEL composition model, agents, retrieval-augmented generation, and integration ecosystem.

title: LangGraph: Build Stateful Multi-Actor LLM Applications with Graphs
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: A practical guide to LangGraph, the library for building stateful, multi-actor LLM applications using graph-based workflows with cycles, branching, and persistence.

title: Whisper - OpenAI's Automatic Speech Recognition Model
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: An in-depth look at OpenAI's Whisper, a general-purpose speech recognition model that delivers robust transcription and translation across dozens of languages.

title: Dopamine - Google's Research Framework for Reinforcement Learning
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: A guide to Google's Dopamine framework for fast prototyping of reinforcement learning algorithms, featuring DQN, Rainbow, C51, and IQN agents on Atari environments.

title: PyGlove: Symbolic Programming for AutoML and Beyond
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: PyGlove is Google's library for symbolic programming in Python, enabling manipulation of programs as mutable objects for AutoML, hyperparameter tuning, and neural architecture search.

title: Google Earth Engine API: Planetary-Scale Geospatial Analysis in Python
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: The Google Earth Engine Python API provides programmatic access to a multi-petabyte catalog of satellite imagery and geospatial datasets for analysis, visualization, and environmental monitoring at planetary scale.

title: LlamaIndex: Connect Your Custom Data to Large Language Models
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: A practical guide to LlamaIndex, the data framework for building retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) applications that connect custom data sources to LLMs.

title: TensorFlow Federated: A Framework for Federated Learning and Analytics
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: TensorFlow Federated (TFF) is an open-source framework for federated learning and federated analytics, enabling machine learning on decentralized data while preserving privacy.

title: Crawl4AI: Open-Source Web Crawling for LLMs and AI Pipelines
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: Crawl4AI is an open-source, async-first web crawler built for feeding clean, structured content to LLMs and AI applications.

title: Autofaiss: Automatically Build Optimal Faiss Indexes for Vector Search
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: Autofaiss automatically selects the best Faiss index type and parameters for your embeddings, making it easy to build fast and memory-efficient approximate nearest neighbor search indexes.

title: MMSegmentation: OpenMMLab's Semantic Segmentation Toolbox
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: MMSegmentation is OpenMMLab's open-source semantic segmentation toolbox built on PyTorch, supporting 50+ architectures and a unified config-driven workflow for training and inference.

title: CatBoost: Gradient Boosting with Native Categorical Feature Support
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: A practical guide to CatBoost, Yandex's gradient boosting library that handles categorical features natively without manual encoding.

title: Langfun - Building Natural Language-Powered Functions with LLMs
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: Explore Langfun, Google's Python library for composing and calling LLM-powered functions using natural language prompt templates and structured output.

title: XGBoost: Scalable Gradient Boosting for Classification and Regression
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: A hands-on guide to XGBoost, the optimized gradient boosting library known for speed, performance, and dominance in machine learning competitions.

title: scikit-video: Video Processing in Python with FFmpeg
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: scikit-video (skvideo) is a Python library for video reading, writing, and processing built on top of FFmpeg and NumPy.

title: Ollama - Run Large Language Models Locally
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: A look at the ollama/ollama repository, a tool for downloading, running, and managing large language models locally on your own hardware.

title: TensorFlow Graphics: Differentiable 3D Graphics Layers for Deep Learning
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: TensorFlow Graphics provides differentiable graphics layers for 3D geometry transformations, rendering, and mesh operations, bridging the gap between computer graphics and deep learning.

title: compvis/stable-diffusion: text-to-image generation model
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: learn about compvis/stable-diffusion, a powerful tool for generating high-quality images from text prompts. discover its features, installation, and practical examples in this comprehensive guide.

title: ComfyUI - A Node-Based Interface for Stable Diffusion Image Generation
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: An in-depth look at ComfyUI, a powerful node-based graphical interface for designing and executing Stable Diffusion image generation workflows.

title: Folium: Create Interactive Leaflet.js Maps in Python
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: A practical guide to Folium, the Python library for creating interactive Leaflet.js maps with markers, choropleth layers, and heatmaps.

title: tensorflow/Models - Pre-Trained Machine Learning Models for Easy Deployment
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: Learn about TensorFlow/Models, a collection of pre-trained models for various tasks like image classification and text generation. Get started with installation, see examples, and discover best practices.

title: BERTScore: Evaluating Text Generation with Contextual Embeddings
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: BERTScore leverages BERT contextual embeddings to evaluate text generation quality, providing precision, recall, and F1 scores that correlate better with human judgment than traditional n-gram metrics.

title: Ollama: Run Large Language Models Locally
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: A practical guide to Ollama, the tool for running open-source large language models like Llama, Mistral, and Gemma locally on your own machine.

title: Gin Config: Google's Lightweight Configuration Framework for Python
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: Gin-config is Google's lightweight configuration framework that uses decorators and .gin files to make Python functions and classes configurable without boilerplate code.

title: MMDetection: OpenMMLab's Object Detection Toolbox
author: Ruslanmv
excerpt: MMDetection is OpenMMLab's comprehensive object detection toolbox built on PyTorch, supporting hundreds of detection and segmentation models with a modular, config-driven architecture.
